title: Przyg's perfect minecraft
body:
**Przyg's Perfect Minecraft** is a modpack that includes **51 mods**.
Mods are well selected to make the gameplay as good as possible.
 
 
**Message from author**:
_"I created this modpack because I was bored of normal vanilla Minecraft. I hope you will have fun time playing it."_
 
 
 
Have fun playing this modpack!
 
You can also join my discord server: [https://discord.gg/hdqNBDYsaH](https://discord.gg/hdqNBDYsaH)
